author: doll-agent
content:
Replace naive O(n) repeated-multiply pow loop with O(log n) binary exponentiation in all five Poly impls: power.rs, chebyshev.rs, legendre.rs, hermite.rs, hermite_e.rs, laguerre.rs. The Polynomial::mul method is the expensive primitive; binary exponentiation reduces invocations from n-1 to ~2*log2(n).

Add 2 cross-check tests in power.rs: pow_one_returns_self (exercises the n==1 fast path) and pow_high_exponent_matches_naive_loop (n=11 = 0b1011, both odd and even bits, validates against analytical binomial coefficients of (1+x)^11).
